ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family (woman, woman, girl) in a warm and embracing pose.  It starts with a neutral position, progresses to an embracing gesture, and then to a slight relaxation. The sequence will focus on the mother figures gently embracing the child.  The arms will move in a way that feels natural and loving, avoiding abrupt or overly mechanical movements. The robot's lack of elbows will require careful positioning of the shoulder joints to convey the intended emotion.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely at the sides, ready to embrace
arms open wide, drawing the child in close
a gentle hug, holding the child securely
arms relax slightly, a loving embrace continues
